basicDetails.schemeName: Old Age Pension Scheme - On Completion of 60 Years (UKBOCWWB)
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Uttarakhand Building And Other Construction Workers Welfare Board

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Old Age Pension Scheme” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (UKBOCWWB) under the Labour Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension to registered construction workers who have attained the age of 60 years.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹1,000/- to construction workers registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board who have attained the age of 60 years.

children.text: The scheme “Old Age Pension Scheme” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (UKBOCWWB) under the Labour Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension to registered construction workers who have attained the age of 60 years.
The online application can be submitted through Shramik Suvidha Kendras.

During the application process, the applicant is required to provide the Shramik Card, Aadhaar Card, Bank Passbook, a Self-Declaration Certificate, and an affidavit stating that no benefit from any other scheme is being availed.
If the documents are found correct during departmental investigation/verification, the pension is sanctioned and disbursed on a half-yearly basis.
After every six months, the worker must submit a life certificate to continue receiving the pension.

applicationProcess.process_md: - The online application can be submitted through Shramik Suvidha Kendras. - During the application process, the applicant is required to provide the Shramik Card, Aadhaar Card, Bank Passbook, a Self-Declaration Certificate, and an affidavit stating that no benefit from any other scheme is being availed. - If the documents are found correct during departmental investigation/verification, the pension is sanctioned and disbursed on a half-yearly basis. - After every six months, the worker must submit a life certificate to continue receiving the pension.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a construction worker registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. 1. The applicant must have completed 60 years of age.

children.text: The applicant must be a construction worker registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
The applicant must have completed 60 years of age.
